results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: DB-GPT AWEL
results.description: AWEL (Agentic Workflow Expression Language) is a framework within DB-GPT for building and managing complex AI agent workflows, enabling the creation of multi-step LLM applications.

results.title: Browser-Agent
results.description: An AI agent for browser automation and web testing using Playwright, compliant with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

results.title: Multi-AI-Agent Systems with crewAI
results.description: This project automates business workflows using autonomous AI agents organized into teams with specific roles and tools, leveraging the crewAI framework for efficient task execution.

results.title: The Recap AI + AI Automation Mastery n8n Workflows, Templates, and Agents
results.description: A collection of n8n agents, workflows, templates, and automations created by The Recap AI for various AI automation tasks, including marketing, dental practice management, customer service, email processing, web development, and content repurposing.

results.title: Paper2Agent
results.description: Paper2Agent is a multi-agent AI system that automatically transforms research papers into interactive AI agents with minimal human input.

results.title: AI2-THOR
results.description: AI2-THOR is a near photo-realistic interactable framework for embodied AI agents, offering diverse scenes, objects, and actions for research in common sense reasoning and manipulation.

results.title: AI Agents
results.description: A provider-agnostic Ruby SDK for building multi-agent AI workflows with seamless handoffs, tool calling, and shared context.

results.title: Flows Feedback Loop
results.description: This project demonstrates how to set up a feedback loop for AI agent workflows using CrewAI, enabling self-evaluation and iterative improvement of generated content.

results.title: JAI Workflow
results.description: A Java library for building, orchestrating, and monitoring agentic AI workflows, RAG systems, and AI agents programmatically with granular control and state management.

results.title: AG2
results.description: AG2 is an open-source programming framework for building AI agents and facilitating cooperation among multiple agents to solve tasks, aiming to streamline the development and research of agentic AI.

results.title: AI Agents
results.description: AI Agents is a Ruby SDK for building sophisticated multi-agent AI workflows, enabling collaboration, tool integration, and seamless conversation handoffs.

results.title: AI SDK Agents
results.description: AI SDK Agents offers full-stack, production-ready patterns for building agents, workflows, and tool calling using Vercel AI SDK v6 and Shadcn/ui.

results.title: GitHub Agentic Workflows
results.description: GitHub Agentic Workflows enables AI-powered repository automation by running natural language workflows that use AI agents to understand context, make decisions, and perform actions safely on GitHub Actions.

results.title: n8n Guidelines for AI Agents
results.description: Provides detailed guidelines and best practices for AI agents to interact with and generate code and expressions for n8n workflows, covering Code Nodes, expressions, data access, and common transformations.

results.title: Spring AI Alibaba
results.description: Spring AI Alibaba is an agentic AI framework for building ChatBot, Workflow, and Multi-agent applications, offering graph-based orchestration, enterprise AI ecosystem integration, and Plan-Act agent products.

results.title: II-Agent
results.description: II-Agent is an open-source intelligent assistant that streamlines workflows by enabling language models to independently execute complex tasks across multiple domains.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: AI Agents for Trading
results.description: An open-source, experimental project featuring a collection of AI agents designed for various trading-related tasks, including a dual-mode AI trading system, strategy management, risk analysis, sentiment analysis, arbitrage, and more, with a focus on algo trading.

results.title: Python A2A
results.description: Python A2A is a powerful, easy-to-use library for implementing Google's [Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol](https://google.github.io/A2A/). It enables seamless communication between AI agents, creating interoperable agent ecosystems that can collaborate to solve complex problems.

results.title: Spring AI Alibaba
results.description: Spring AI Alibaba is an agentic AI framework for Java developers that provides context engineering, multi-agent support, and workflow capabilities to build AI-native applications.

results.title: Agentic Project Management
results.description: A framework for structuring and managing complex projects using multiple AI agents. Implements a workflow with Manager and Implementation Agents, Memory Banks, and Handover Protocols, inspired by real-world team management. Designed for use with AI assistants like Cursor.

results.title: BeeAI Framework
results.description: Build production-ready AI agents in both Python and Typescript

results.title: Instantly API V2
results.description: The Instantly API V2 provides a comprehensive set of endpoints for managing email campaigns, accounts, leads, analytics, and various automation features.

results.title: A2A4J
results.description: A2A4J is a Java implementation of the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol, enabling AI agents to discover capabilities, collaborate, and exchange information securely using reactive programming.

results.title: Agent Lightning
results.description: Agent Lightning is a trainer for AI agents that enables optimization with minimal code changes, supports various agent frameworks, and leverages algorithms like Reinforcement Learning and Automatic Prompt Optimization.

results.title: Embabel Agent
results.description: Embabel Agent is a framework for building sophisticated, goal-driven AI agents on the JVM, enabling them to plan, use tools, and integrate with existing systems through strong typing and domain-integrated context engineering.

results.title: Agent.ai
results.description: Agent.AI is a marketplace and professional network for AI agents, allowing users to discover, connect with, and hire AI agents, and for builders to create advanced AI agents using a no-code platform with data tools and access to frontier LLMs.

results.title: Workflows Python
results.description: Workflows are an event-driven, async-first, step-based way to control the execution flow of AI applications like agents.

results.title: DB-GPT
results.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents
